selected_projects.label: Climate Sim Pipeline
selected_projects.description: Python workflow for running climate simulations, managing input decks, submitting HPC jobs, and collecting outputs.

selected_projects.label: Research Plotting Toolkit
selected_projects.description: Reusable plotting and reporting package for research datasets, validation figures, and publication-ready outputs.

selected_projects.label: LLM Experiment Tracker
selected_projects.description: Research-facing platform for tracking prompts, model outputs, rubric scores, and experiment metadata.

selected_projects.label: Research Review Assistant
selected_projects.description: Human-review assistant for summarizing research artifacts with structured outputs, validation checks, and citations.

selected_projects.label: Lab Data Normalizer
selected_projects.description: Python package for normalizing instrument exports, validating fields, and creating reproducible analysis tables.

selected_projects.label: HPC Job Monitor
selected_projects.description: CLI and dashboard utilities for monitoring cluster jobs, failed runs, logs, and restartable batch workflows.

bullets.text: Packaged research code for reuse across multiple scientific teams.
Added pytest validation suites for numerical workflows and data-processing utilities.
Refactored notebook-heavy workflows into tested Python modules.
Documented research software interfaces for scientists and engineers.
Automated cluster batch runs for parameter studies and long-running simulations.
Standardized simulation outputs, logs, and report-ready artifacts.
Created restartable HPC job workflows to reduce wasted compute time.
Debugged failed cluster runs using logs, job metadata, and reproducible test cases.
Taught reproducible Python workflows for scientific computing projects.
Created research-code exercises covering testing, packaging, and documentation.
Mentored students on validation, debugging, and clear technical reporting.
Prepared dataset-based assignments for iterative scientific software work.
Implemented structured LLM outputs using typed schemas and validation logic.
Built retry and validation paths for unreliable model responses.
Added human-review gates before generated analysis could be accepted.
Created prompt-contract tests for model-assisted research workflows.
Reviewed model reasoning failures in technical and quantitative tasks.
Created rubric-based feedback for improving model behavior.
Identified edge cases in generated outputs and documented recurring failure patterns.
Compared model outputs against reference answers and scoring criteria.
Built research-facing API tools for experiment tracking and data review.
Documented experimental workflows for reproducible handoff between teams.
Created data-validation helpers for research datasets and generated reports.
Supported scientists with debugging, workflow cleanup, and repeatability improvements.

core_skills.Python: Python, packaging, pytest, type hints, CLI tools, pandas, NumPy, logging
core_skills.Scientific Computing: Numerical workflows, data processing, simulation outputs, reproducible analysis
core_skills.HPC: Batch jobs, scheduler workflows, cluster runs, restartable campaigns, job logs
core_skills.Linux: Shell workflows, filesystem conventions, environment setup, debugging
core_skills.Automation: Python/Bash automation, batch execution, report generation, workflow orchestration
core_skills.Reproducibility: Versioned inputs, deterministic outputs, validation checks, documented assumptions
core_skills.Documentation: User guides, developer notes, research handoff docs, examples, tutorials
core_skills.FastAPI: Research-facing APIs, service-layer routes, validation-heavy endpoints
core_skills.Pydantic: Typed schemas, structured outputs, validation, response contracts
core_skills.LLM Integration: Structured LLM outputs, retries, evidence checks, human-review workflows
core_skills.Evaluation Workflows: Rubrics, scoring, failure analysis, regression examples, eval datasets
core_skills.Research Tooling: Experiment tracking, plotting, data normalization, reusable packages
core_skills.Human Review: Review queues, approval workflows, generated-content boundaries
core_skills.Data Engineering: CSV/JSON ingestion, normalization, schema checks, report tables
